title: aurinia media
intro: Aurinia media, also known as wallflower, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. Its medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Aurinia media include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as a natural laxative. Aurinia media can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
